item.title: Arizona, US
item.description: The Grand Canyon is a steep-sided canyon carved by the Colorado River in Arizona, United States. The canyon is 277 miles (446 km) long, up to 18 miles (29 km) wide and attains a depth of over a mile (6,093 feet or 1,857 meters).

item.title: About
item.description: pre.froggie { display: inline-block; float: right; color: #0f0; background: #111; width: 116px; margin-left: 15px; border-radius: 20px; } @..@ (\--/) (.__I’m an engineer, a leader, an architect, huge data geek, a security enthusiast, pragmatic technologist, full-time paranoid, a ghost. Freedom isn’t free. Privacy can’t be regained. Fight for freedom and protect your privacy. The comments posted on this blog represent only my opinions and not those of my current employer.
